arts.ttl: Hansi Flick confirms Dani Olmo starting status for Spanish Supercup final
arts.sum: Barcelona will have Dani Olmo and Pau Victor available for Sunday’s Spanish Super Cup final after receiving a precautionary measure earlier this week, although it is far from certain that either player will be in line to start against Real Madrid in Saudi Arabia. arts.ttl: Barcelona hold Marcus Rashford talks and discover price to seal January move
arts.sum: Barcelona have held talks about landing Marcus Rashford in January but they will have to take on all of the Manchester United star's wages if they want to secure a loa move

arts.sum: Barcelona are ready to make a deal to sign Marcus Rashford from Manchester United. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Barcelona return opens up in Lionel Messi contract reveal
arts.sum: Lionel Messi is working on a contract extension at Inter Miami to stretch his link with the club into 2026. Messi’s current deal in Florida ends in December 2025, to mirror the structure of the regular MLS season, with both parties looking for another 12 months. arts.ttl: Barcelona Transfer News: Blaugrana braced for painful Ronald Araujo sale - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano, Barcelona have been aware of Juventus' interest since last week, and the Bianconeri are now ready to take their pursuit of Araujo into the next gear. Barcelona are braced for formal negotiations with Juventus over Ronald Araujo, according to Fabrizio Romano.
